goal: Run bounded backend spikes and write a recommendation report for graph/vector/backend choices.
forbidden_moves: Do not modify production code in this spike task.
Do not commit generated indexes, model caches, or raw experiment data.
Do not add dependencies to requirements.txt from spike results without a follow-up accepted task.
required_checks: Document spike commands and outcomes in the executor report
deliverables: Recommendation: LanceDB or Qdrant for first implementation
Recommendation: Graphiti adapter or own graph extractor first
escalation_path: A production dependency must be added before the spike can proceed
Graphiti requires a graph backend that conflicts with ADR-0003
The spike finds embedded storage is not viable
artifact_expectations: Use .local/ for disposable scripts and notes.
Use only synthetic or public non-sensitive data.
